text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Good day to you, Trainer. I'm Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My dream? ...I do wish to be a prim and proper
Japanese lady. That said, however...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If I am to blossom, I shall do so at the very peak,
and nowhere else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
